description: World model 决策树工具和 schema 文档

entries.title: world_model.json 完整 JSON Schema 定义
四大操作框架 (Init / Select / Refine / Analyze)

scripts.name: wm_ops.py
scripts.purpose: CLI 工具：节点选择/验证/摘要/深度 profiling

scripts.name: profiling_evidence.py
scripts.purpose: 瓶颈分析 → 策略映射（Phase B 将拆为 extract_facts + match_strategies_by_labels）

scripts.name: state_ops.py
scripts.purpose: state.json 读写 (hook + wm_ops 私有账本)

scripts.name: transcript_audit.py
scripts.purpose: SubagentStop hook 调用，audit partial 是否调了 evaluation/build 脚本

scripts.name: check_round_artifacts.py
scripts.purpose: Stop hook 调用，校验本轮 artifact 完整性
